title: Logic
purpose: `math/logic.vitl` is a public stdlib surface inside the `math` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: Arithmetic, algebra, comparison, calculus, geometry, modular arithmetic, number theory, probability, statistics, matrix, and vector helpers.
use_cases: A scoring engine can compute aggregates in `math` while keeping I/O and transport elsewhere.
A statistics or matrix chapter should explain the workflow around the computation, not just a single formula.
